mapper.select: SELECT i.material_id, i.material_code, i.material_name, i.specification_model, i.unit, i.quantity, i.available_quantity AS availableQuantity, (i.quantity * i.unit_price) AS totalAmount FROM b_inventory i WHERE i.quantity > 0 ORDER BY i.quantity DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(po.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, SUM(po.total_amount) AS totalAmount, COUNT(DISTINCT po.purchase_order_id) AS orderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT poi.material_id) AS materialCount FROM b_purchase_order po LEFT JOIN b_purchase_order_item poi ON po.purchase_order_id = poi.purchase_order_id WHERE po.deleted_flag = 0 AND po.approval_status = 2 AND DATE(po.create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(po.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(oo.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, SUM(oo.total_amount) AS totalAmount, COUNT(DISTINCT oo.outbound_order_id) AS orderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT ooi.material_id) AS materialCount FROM b_outbound_order oo LEFT JOIN b_outbound_order_item ooi ON oo.outbound_order_id = ooi.outbound_order_id WHERE oo.deleted_flag = 0 AND oo.status = 2 AND DATE(oo.create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(oo.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM b_material WHERE deleted_flag = 0) AS materialCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM b_project WHERE deleted_flag = 0) AS projectCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM b_supplier WHERE deleted_flag = 0) AS supplierCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM b_inventory WHERE warning_status > 0) AS inventoryWarningCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM b_purchase_order WHERE deleted_flag = 0 AND approval_status = 1) AS pendingPurchaseCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM b_outbound_order WHERE deleted_flag = 0 AND approval_status = 1) AS pendingOutboundCount
